description: Fashionable sandals for men from lotto, fusing the sturdy floater-style sandals with carefree flip flops. Wear this for all casual occasions.UpperFabric upper with thong style straps and ankle straps to lock the foot in placeFabric toe separator for comfort and durability with brandingFabric ankle straps with velcro fastening Fabric connector between the thong straps and ankle strapsPadded rubber footbed with stitch detailing and textured grooves for instep comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with multidirectional lugs on the forefoot and heel region for grip and tractionHerringbone pattern terracing on the midfoot regionSandal careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
